description: If you want to possess a trendy and stylish look, just have a glance over the range of classy footloose backpacks. Innovative design, graceful colours and high grade fabrics are some relevant qualities of these bags. They are known for their extreme quality features which include flawless finishing, low price rates, enough space, light weight, trendy style and supreme quality fabric. Height: 46 cm Width: 32 cm Depth: 14 cm Warranty: 1 year Made of 600 d PU fabric for enhanced durability Two roomy zippered compartments one with organizer pouches to hold your mobile and essentials A second zippered pocket on the front with an mp3 or ipod port Brand name embroidered on the front Brand badge appliqué d on the side Two zippered pockets on the sides for enhanced space Short padded handle on top for carrying ease Padded, adjustable shoulder straps with mesh under the straps that ensure ventilation and distribute weight evenly and protect the shoulders and back from injuries Cushioned mesh panels on the back for added comfort Ergonomic design to Fit along the torso comfortably Branded zippers and sliders for easy use Care Do not machine wash Rub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
